title: VBCS Page Builder Metadata
description: Developer-provided metadata for generating VBCS Redwood pages. Fill in the fields relevant to your page template and pass to the agent.

template.description: Redwood page template to use. Determines which skill generates the page.

pageName.description: VBCS page ID in kebab-case. Example: 'employee-search', 'project-list'

pageTitle.description: Display title shown in the page header. Example: 'Employees', 'Project Dashboard'

pageSubtitle.description: Optional subtitle below the page title.

flowName.description: VBCS flow name in kebab-case. Example: 'main', 'employee-management'

appType.description: standalone = VB app ($application.path), extension = AppUI extension ($extension.path)

backendType.description: adf = Oracle Business Objects / Fusion (server-side filtering via SDP+DPV). non-adf = Spring Boot, Node, ORDS custom REST (client-side filtering via ADP).

layout.description: Redwood page layout. Most pages use fullWidth.

entity.description: The primary business entity this page works with.

name.description: Entity name in PascalCase. Used for variable naming. Example: 'Employee', 'Program', 'Invoice'

keyField.description: Primary key field name from the API response. Example: 'id', 'programId'

displayFields.description: Fields to show in card/list templates. Example: ['name', 'department', 'status']

rest.description: REST endpoint configuration. Captures both the physical data store location (baseUrl + endpointPath) and the logical VBCS service connection reference (serviceName + operationId).

baseUrl.description: Physical REST API base URL. Required when the service connection does not yet exist and needs to be created. Example: 'https://myapp.oraclecloud.com/ic/api/v1', 'https://myords.example.com/ords/myschema', 'https://api.example.com/v2'

endpointPath.description: Resource endpoint path appended to baseUrl. Example: '/Employee', '/employees', '/projects'. Combined with baseUrl gives the full REST endpoint: baseUrl + endpointPath.

serviceName.description: VBCS service connection name that wraps the REST endpoint. Example: 'businessObjects', 'employeeService', 'ordsApi'

operationId.description: Operation ID for the GET list (getAll) operation from the OpenAPI spec. Example: 'getall_Employee', 'getEmployees'

operations.description: Operation IDs for individual CRUD operations. Required for data management pages that create, update, or delete records. Each maps to an operationId in the service connection's OpenAPI spec.

create.description: POST operation ID for creating a new record. Example: 'create_Employee', 'createEmployee'

update.description: PATCH or PUT operation ID for updating an existing record. Example: 'update_Employee', 'patchEmployee'

delete.description: DELETE operation ID for removing a record. Example: 'delete_Employee', 'deleteEmployee'

getById.description: GET single record operation ID. Used by drawer detail views and drill-down pages. Example: 'get_Employee', 'getEmployee'

errorResponsePath.description: Dot-notation path to the error message within the REST error response body. Example: 'o:errorDetails[0].detail' (ADF/ORDS), 'message' (Spring Boot), 'detail' (generic REST). Used in failure paths of action chains.

itemsPath.description: Path to the array of records in the response body. Example: 'items' (ORDS/ADF), 'content' (Spring Boot), '' (raw array)

fields.description: Field definitions from the API response.

name.description: Field name exactly as it appears in the API response (case-sensitive).

label.description: Human-readable label for UI display. Defaults to name if omitted.

paginationStyle.description: offset-limit = ORDS ({offset, limit}). page-size = Spring Boot ({page, size}). none = returns all.

totalField.description: Field in response containing total record count. Example: 'totalResults', 'count'

requestParams.description: Additional static query or URI params to always include.

search.description: Smart Search configuration. Required when template = 'smart-search-page'.

keywordFields.description: Fields that free-text keyword search applies to. Example: ['firstName', 'lastName', 'email']

placeholder.description: Placeholder text in the search input.

configFileName.description: Name of the search config JSON file (without path). Example: 'employeeSearchConfig.json'

filters.description: Filter definitions for the smart search component.

name.description: Filter identifier in PascalCase. Must match across config JSON, searchContext, and $search.filters expressions. Example: 'StatusFilter', 'DepartmentsFilter'

label.description: Display label shown as the chip text. Example: 'Status', 'Department'

field.description: API response field name this filter matches (case-sensitive). Example: 'status', 'department', 'salary'

options.description: Required for SelectSingle and SelectMultiple filters.

source.description: static = inline array of {value, label}. dynamic = SDP from related business object.

staticValues.description: For source='static'. Array of {value, label} objects.

dynamicEndpoint.description: For source='dynamic'. SDP config for related BO.

collection.description: How to display the data collection.

showCollectionContainer.description: Whether to wrap collection in oj-sp-collection-container (shows result count).

fetchSize.description: Number of records per fetch for infinite scroll.

columns.description: Column definitions for table or dynamic-table display.

template.description: Rendering template for the cell content.

cardLayout.description: Card layout config for card-view display.

listLayout.description: List layout config for list-view display.

parentPage.description: Parent page ID for back navigation. Omit if this is the landing page.

parentLabel.description: Label shown next to back arrow. Example: 'Dashboard'

drillDownPage.description: Page to navigate to on row/card click. Example: 'employee-detail'

drillDownParam.description: Parameter name to pass on drill-down. Example: 'employeeId'

drillDownField.description: Field from the row data to pass as the parameter value. Example: 'id'

contextSwitcher.description: Context switcher dropdown in the page header.

dataGrid.description: Data Grid configuration. Required when template = 'data-management-page'.

editMode.description: cell-edit = oj-data-grid with cellEdit mode. row-edit = oj-table with rowEdit mode. read-only = no editing.

pattern.description: data-grid-pattern = single grid. data-collections-organizer-pattern = tabs + multiple grids.

columns.description: Column definitions for the data grid or table.

type.description: Input type when in edit mode.

lov.description: List of Values config for select-type columns.

dataSource.description: SDP variable name for this tab's data.

columnHeaderFiltering.description: When true, generate per-column header filters on oj-data-grid (ListDataProviderView + filterCriterion). Distinct from Smart Search toolbar filters.

hideShow.description: Column and row hide/show configuration for oj-data-grid. Adds Hide/Show options to header context menus and supports programmatic control via observables.

columnHidable.description: Adds Hide/Show to column header context menu (header.column.hidable).

rowHidable.description: Adds Hide/Show to row header context menu (header.row.hidable).

initialHiddenColumns.description: Column indices hidden on page load. Example: [0, 5]. Set via init chain as new Set([...]).

initialHiddenRows.description: Row indices hidden on page load. Example: [0, 7]. Set via init chain as new Set([...]).

programmaticControl.description: When true, generate an oj-select-many dropdown for programmatic hide/show alongside the context menu.

dataTransfer.description: Data transfer (clipboard) options for oj-data-grid. Enables cut/copy/paste/fill for spreadsheet-like interactions. Requires edit-mode cellEdit and selection-mode.cell multiple.

paste.description: Enable Ctrl+V / context menu Paste. Uses Clipboard API (requires HTTPS).

fill.description: Enable drag-to-fill from the corner of a selected cell range.

drawer.description: Drawer configuration for the data management page.

position.description: end = side drawer (vertical scroll grids). bottom = bottom drawer (horizontal scroll grids).

type.description: modal = content covered. inline = content pushed.
